collections.name: Midnight Vein
collections.description: Obsidian, onyx and darker inclusions arranged with cinematic contrast.

collections.name: Earthlight
collections.description: Warm calcites, desert veining and pale mineral glow.

collections.name: Atlas Rare
collections.description: Rare stones with compelling origin stories and sharply limited availability.

products.name: Noir Obsidian Heart
products.shortDescription: A polished obsidian form with mirrored depth and sculptural weight.
products.description: A singular black obsidian stone selected for deep tonal variation, crisp polish and architectural silhouette. Intended as a statement piece for library tables, private offices and curated interiors.
products.seoDescription: A one-of-one obsidian statement stone with certified provenance.

products.name: Desert Calcite Prism
products.shortDescription: Warm ivory calcite with layered translucence and quiet internal glow.
products.description: An editorial-grade calcite prism chosen for warm tone, subtle banding and natural luminosity. Designed to bring softness into darker interiors.

products.name: Aurora Agate Orbit
products.shortDescription: Banded agate chosen for movement, tone shift and horizon-like layering.
products.description: Agate with a finely balanced orbit-like cut that reveals mineral striping and soft colour transitions. Suitable for quieter study spaces and intimate retail displays.

products.name: Graphite Onyx Column
products.shortDescription: Architectural onyx column with narrow veining and deep graphite shadow.
products.description: A taller format piece suited to entry consoles and hospitality settings requiring sculptural mineral presence.

products.name: Atlas Quartz Flame
products.shortDescription: Clear quartz with dramatic internal veils and a flame-cut stance.
products.description: Selected for clarity variation and kinetic internal fractures that catch directional light with restraint.

products.name: Alabaster Veil
products.shortDescription: Soft alabaster with layered surface movement and diffuse sheen.
products.description: An intimate desk object chosen for softness, matte glow and tonal calm.

products.name: Basalt Horizon Block
products.shortDescription: Textural basalt block for spatial grounding and tonal contrast.
products.description: A sculptural basalt piece that offers rougher tactility for more minimal interiors.

products.name: Moonstone Ledger
products.shortDescription: Linear moonstone with cool flash and elegant tabletop posture.
products.description: A restrained moonstone presentation intended for layered interiors and collectors seeking cooler tonality.

products.name: Playwright Stone 1784426004119 Edited
products.shortDescription: Playwright product created to verify admin and storefront publication.

pages.title: About
pages.content: STONZA presents natural stones through an editorial lens, pairing geological storytelling with strict curation and transparent provenance.
pages.seoDescription: Learn about STONZA's curation, provenance standards and editorial approach to natural stones.

pages.title: Authenticity
pages.content: Each STONZA stone includes clear treatment disclosure, sourcing notes and, where applicable, certificate references and downloadable documentation.
pages.seoDescription: Understand STONZA's approach to authenticity, treatment disclosure and certification.

pages.title: Contact
pages.content: Use the contact form or WhatsApp concierge for sourcing requests, certificates, shipping questions and private appointments.
pages.seoDescription: Reach the STONZA team for enquiries, sourcing and private appointments.

journalPosts.title: Why Origin Matters More Than Gloss
journalPosts.content: Collectors increasingly ask about origin, treatment and chain of handling. We think they should.
journalPosts.seoTitle: Why Origin Matters More Than Gloss
journalPosts.seoDescription: STONZA on why provenance and treatment disclosure define real value in natural stones.
journalPosts.excerpt: Collectors increasingly ask about origin, treatment and chain of handling.

journalPosts.title: Lighting Stone For Editorial Interiors
journalPosts.content: The right light reveals internal structure without flattening the mystery that makes a stone compelling.
journalPosts.seoDescription: A practical STONZA guide to presenting natural stones in refined interiors.
journalPosts.excerpt: The right light reveals internal structure without flattening the mystery.
